title: corybas karoensis
intro: Corybas karoensis, also known as the 'Karo's corybas', is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The Corybas karoensis is believed to possess health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the body from infection. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
